input.initialPrompt: Modernize this project to SDK-style format. Identify all legacy patterns and suggest how to simplify the project file.

data.content:
Here's my analysis of the legacy patterns and the modernized solution:

**Legacy patterns identified:**

| # | Pattern | Resolution |
|---|---------|-----------|
| 1 | Non-SDK `<Project>` with `ToolsVersion` + `xmlns` | Use `<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">` |
| 2 | Explicit `Import` of Common.props / CSharp.targets | Implied by SDK |
| 3 | `Configuration`/`Platform` conditionals with defaults | SDK defaults handle these |
| 4 | Debug/Release PropertyGroups (OutputPath, DebugType, etc.) | SDK conventions cover all of this |
| 5 | `ProjectGuid`, `FileAlignment`, `Deterministic` | Unnecessary — SDK defaults |
| 6 | `AutoGenerateBindingRedirects` | Default `true` in SDK-style |
| 7 | Explicit `<Compile Include="...">` items | SDK auto-globs all `.cs` files |
| 8 | Explicit `<Reference>` for BCL assemblies | Implicit with framework targeting |
| 9 | `Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs` | Replaced by project-level properties |

Now let me apply the modernization:

arguments.old_str:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<Project ToolsVersion="15.0" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003">
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildExtensionsPath)\$(MSBuildToolsVersion)\Microsoft.Common.props" Condition="Exists('$(MSBuildExtensionsPath)\$(MSBuildToolsVersion)\Microsoft.Common.props')" />
  <PropertyGroup>
    <Configuration Condition=" '$(Configuration)' == '' ">Debug</Configuration>
    <Platform Condition=" '$(Platform)' == '' ">AnyCPU</Platform>
    <ProjectGuid>{12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012}</ProjectGuid>
    <OutputType>Library</OutputType>
    <RootNamespace>LegacyApp</RootNamespace>
    <AssemblyName>LegacyApp</AssemblyName>
    <TargetFrameworkVersion>v4.7.2</TargetFrameworkVersion>
    <FileAlignment>512</FileAlignment>
    <AutoGenerateBindingRedirects>true</AutoGenerateBindingRedirects>
    <Deterministic>true</Deterministic>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <PropertyGroup Condition=" '$(Configuration)|$(Platform)' == 'Debug|AnyCPU' ">
    <DebugSymbols>true</DebugSymbols>
    <DebugType>full</DebugType>
    <Optimize>false</Optimize>
    <OutputPath>bin\Debug\</OutputPath>
    <DefineConstants>DEBUG;TRACE</DefineConstants>
    <ErrorReport>prompt</ErrorReport>
    <WarningLevel>4</WarningLevel>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <PropertyGroup Condition=" '$(Configuration)|$(Platform)' == 'Release|AnyCPU' ">
    <DebugType>pdbonly</DebugType>
    <Optimize>true</Optimize>
    <OutputPath>bin\Release\</OutputPath>
    <DefineConstants>TRACE</DefineConstants>
    <ErrorReport>prompt</ErrorReport>
    <WarningLevel>4</WarningLevel>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <Reference Include="System" />
    <Reference Include="System.Core" />
    <Reference Include="System.Data" />
    <Reference Include="System.Xml" />
    <Reference Include="System.Xml.Linq" />
    <Reference Include="Microsoft.CSharp" />
  </ItemGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <Compile Include="Calculator.cs" />
    <Compile Include="StringHelper.cs" />
    <Compile Include="Properties\AssemblyInfo.cs" />
  </ItemGroup>
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildToolsPath)\Microsoft.CSharp.targets" />
</Project>
arguments.new_str:
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">

  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net472</TargetFramework>
    <RootNamespace>LegacyApp</RootNamespace>
    <AssemblyName>LegacyApp</AssemblyName>
    <Description>A legacy-style project for modernization testing</Description>
    <Company>TestCo</Company>
    <Copyright>Copyright © 2024</Copyright>
    <Version>1.0.0.0</Version>
  </PropertyGroup>

</Project>

data.reasoningText:
Now I have a complete picture. Let me identify all legacy patterns and explain how to modernize:

1. **Non-SDK-style project format** - Uses `ToolsVersion`, `xmlns`, explicit `Import` of `Microsoft.Common.props` and `Microsoft.CSharp.targets`
2. **Explicit `Compile` items** - SDK-style auto-globs `.cs` files
3. **AssemblyInfo.cs** - SDK-style auto-generates assembly attributes from project properties
4. **Explicit framework references** (`System`, `System.Core`, etc.) - Not needed in SDK-style
5. **Configuration/Platform conditional PropertyGroups** - Defaults are handled by the SDK


6. **ProjectGuid, FileAlignment, AutoGenerateBindingRedirects, Deterministic** - All unnecessary in SDK-style
7. **TargetFrameworkVersion v4.7.2** - Becomes `net472` in the modern format

The modernized version will be drastically simpler. I'll keep the target framework at net472 as specified, then create the streamlined project file.

  <Import Project="$(MSBuildExtensionsPath)\$(MSBuildToolsVersion)\Microsoft.Common.props" Condition="Exists('$(MSBuildExtensionsPath)\$(MSBuildToolsVersion)\Microsoft.Common.props')" />
  <PropertyGroup>
    <Configuration Condition=" '$(Configuration)' == '' ">Debug</Configuration>
    <Platform Condition=" '$(Platform)' == '' ">AnyCPU</Platform>
    <ProjectGuid>{12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012}</ProjectGuid>
    <OutputType>Library</OutputType>
    <RootNamespace>LegacyApp</RootNamespace>
    <AssemblyName>LegacyApp</AssemblyName>
    <TargetFrameworkVersion>v4.7.2</TargetFrameworkVersion>
    <FileAlignment>512</FileAlignment>
    <AutoGenerateBindingRedirects>true</AutoGenerateBindingRedirects>
    <Deterministic>true</Deterministic>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <PropertyGroup Condition=" '$(Configuration)|$(Platform)' == 'Debug|AnyCPU' ">
    <DebugSymbols>true</DebugSymbols>
    <DebugType>full</DebugType>
    <Optimize>false</Optimize>
    <OutputPath>bin\Debug\</OutputPath>
    <DefineConstants>DEBUG;TRACE</DefineConstants>
    <ErrorReport>prompt</ErrorReport>
    <WarningLevel>4</WarningLevel>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <PropertyGroup Condition=" '$(Configuration)|$(Platform)' == 'Release|AnyCPU' ">
    <DebugType>pdbonly</DebugType>
    <Optimize>true</Optimize>

    <DefineConstants>TRACE</DefineConstants>

  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>

data.content:
Done. The project went from **47 lines → 13 lines**. Here's what was removed/simplified:

- **XML declaration, `ToolsVersion`, `xmlns`** — replaced by `Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk"`
- **Explicit imports** of `.props`/`.targets` — implied by SDK
- **Debug/Release PropertyGroups** — SDK provides sensible defaults
- **`ProjectGuid`, `FileAlignment`, `Deterministic`, `AutoGenerateBindingRedirects`** — all unnecessary
- **`<Compile>` items** — SDK auto-globs `*.cs`
- **BCL `<Reference>` items** — implicit with `net472` targeting
- **`Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs`** — metadata moved to `<PropertyGroup>` (SDK auto-generates the assembly attributes)
- **`OutputType`** — `Library` is the default

The `.cs` source files remain unchanged and require no modifications.
